outcome.notes: Keyboard-only operator selection is completely broken. The operator selector receives focus but does not respond to Up/Down/arrow keys at all — it stays stuck on the default `+`. This affects ALL non-default operators, not just `-`: × and / could not be tested because no non-default operator can be selected via keyboard. The Calculate/Enter mechanism itself works (Enter triggers the calculation), but because the operator is stuck on `+`, step 4 produced Result: 1 (3 + -2) instead of the expected 5. Clearing the first number (Cmd+A + Delete) correctly resets the result to `—`. control-not-responsive pattern Try items already covered by observations: focus is received, default value works, failure is page-wide for keyboard input on this control across all non-default options.

steps.description: Up/Down arrows do not change the operator at all — stuck on default `+`. The control receives focus but does not respond to keyboard input. Fails for all non-default operators (× and / unselectable via keyboard too).
Calculate/Enter mechanism works (Enter triggers calculation), but operator stuck on default `+` yields Result: 1 (3 + -2) instead of the expected 5. Fails as written.
